headerTitle: Senior Full-Stack Engineer  ·  Daybreak Technologies  ·  Remote
intro: Full-stack engineering is where I live — from schema design through API contracts to the React component tree and into deployment automation. At Daybreak's scale, a senior engineer has to be effective across the entire system rather than just owning a slice, which is how I've operated building multiple products from zero.
bullets: Production Full-Stack at Depth — Built complete Next.js + Node.js + PostgreSQL applications including real-time features (WebSockets), complex relational schemas, REST and webhook APIs, and multi-role auth — shipped to live users, not sandboxes.

AI Feature Integration — Integrated Claude API, ElevenLabs TTS, and GA4 event tracking into a production SaaS admin platform — streaming responses, voice synthesis, and behavioral telemetry as first-class features alongside the core product.

Infrastructure and Deployment — Managed Docker-containerized services, PM2 process supervision, VPS provisioning, automated SCP deploys, and Nginx reverse proxying — comfortable owning the full path from local build to live endpoint.
matchNotes: Direct full-stack match — React, Node, cloud deployment, AI integration all line up cleanly
